headline: Is Mid-America Apartment Communities (MAA) Starting To Look Attractive After A 21% Share Price Slide
summary: If you are wondering whether Mid-America Apartment Communities is starting to look interesting at current levels, the key question is how its price stacks up against its underlying value. The stock last closed at US$121.79, with returns of a 3.6% decline over 7 days, 9.9% decline over 30 days, 12.5% decline year to date and 21.2% decline over the past year. This may change how you think about its risk and reward profile today. These moves have put more attention on what is driving sentiment...
